title: Everything That Glitters
overview: Victoria Robinson seems to have a perfect life. But her unfaithful husband and a sexy younger man with dark motives will lead her into a dangerous game of cat and mouse where she’ll discover that the perfect life comes with a high cost.

trailers.title: Everything that Glitters | UMC | Premieres Thursday, December 27th
